name: search_messages
trigger_description:
Use this tool when the user asks to:
Find a specific email they sent or received
Locate a message with a known subject or phrase
Identify a particular inbound or outbound email
Do not use this tool when:
Conversation-level context is required (use search_threads)
Full message content is required immediately (use retrieval tools)
Almost always prefer structured search parameters. Use raw_query only when the user explicitly provides Gmail search syntax.
